Correcting Misconceptions: The idea that 'period pain is normal' often leads to a significant diagnostic delay for conditions like endometriosis. Let's explore the medical reality.🧵👇

Research shows that endometriosis diagnosis takes, on average, ten years. This delay is often exacerbated by the misconception that severe menstrual pain is just a normal part of life, hindering timely medical evaluation.

Understanding your body and seeking timely care empowers you to make informed decisions about your health. For comprehensive information and options, visit: https://doctors-guide-womens-health.vercel.app/en Source: pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40999898/ #WomensHealth
